# Visual Studio
.vs/
.vscode/

# Build results
bin/
obj/

# User-specific files
*.user
*.suo
*.userosscache
*.sln.docstates

# Rider
.idea/

# NuGet
packages/
*.nupkg

# Logs
*.log

# ASP.NET Scaffolding
ScaffoldingReadMe.txt

# Publish output
publish/

# IIS Express
.applicationhost.config

# OS files
Thumbs.db
Desktop.ini
.DS_Store

# Generated files
wwwroot/lib/

# Secrets
secrets.json
appsettings.Local.json
